summary: Comprehensive testing of ReVent iteration 3 features: (1) Splash redirect bug fix, (2) Character Creator Name field removal, (3) Onboarding chatbot flow. All backend tests pass (26/26). All frontend flows verified.

issues: File is 1400+ lines - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability

critical_code_review_comments: App.jsx is still a single large file - consider splitting for maintainability

existing_user.note: User with onboarding_complete=true, goes directly to chat

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during testing: test_onboard_*, test_bypass_*, test_skip_*, test_ui_flow_*

splash_redirect_fix.details: Authenticated users skip splash and go directly to chat (no more ~1 minute redirect bug). View state starts as null (loading spinner) until auth check completes.

loading_screen.details: View=null shows loading spinner with ReVent logo while auth check is in progress

unauthenticated_splash.details: Unauthenticated users see splash screen with Get Started button

existing_user_direct_to_chat.details: User with onboarding_complete=true goes directly to chat after login

new_user_signup_flow.details: Auth → Beta Modal (2000 coins) → Onboarding slides → Name → Language → Chat

character_creator_step5_no_name.details: Step 5 shows only Backstory field (no Name input field). Character uses base_role as label.

chat_welcome_personalized.details: GET /api/chat/welcome returns personalized welcome based on user name and onboarding status

onboarding_chat_triggers.details: POST /api/chat with default RE persona (empty persona_config, not GOSSIP) triggers onboarding for new users

gossip_bypasses_onboarding.details: POST /api/chat with manual_mode=GOSSIP bypasses onboarding flow

custom_persona_bypasses_onboarding.details: POST /api/chat with custom persona_config bypasses onboarding flow

onboarding_consent_yes.details: User saying yes to consent proceeds to Phase 1 movie questions

onboarding_consent_no.details: User saying no to consent is respected gracefully, can retry later

onboarding_skip_keyword.details: Skip keywords (skip, next, pass, etc.) work to skip current question

onboarding_phase_progression.details: Onboarding progresses through phases: Welcome → Movies/Music → Emotional Style → Mindset → Trust → Dreams

personality_tags_extraction.details: Answers like 'thriller' movies extract tags like 'analytical_mind'

backend_tests_summary.TestOnboardingChatFlow: 3/3 passed - initial triggers consent, consent yes proceeds, consent no respects decline
backend_tests_summary.TestOnboardingBypass: 2/2 passed - GOSSIP bypasses, custom persona bypasses
backend_tests_summary.TestExistingUserChatWelcome: 1/1 passed - completed user gets personalized welcome
backend_tests_summary.TestCharacterCreatorNaming: 1/1 passed - character uses base_role as label

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features working correctly. Splash redirect bug is fixed - authenticated users skip splash. Character Creator step 5 has no Name field. Onboarding chatbot flow is fully functional with 5 phases. Test user: testuser_vent@test.com / Test123! (onboarding_complete=true). New users get 2000 coins on signup and go through onboarding flow before chat.
